summary: Legal Archive P1 Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 17/18 tests PASSED (1 minor failure - unauthenticated returns 403 instead of 401, acceptable behavior). Frontend: All UI elements verified - stat cards (Total=7, Consents=2, E-Signatures=1, Invoices=4), search bar, filter pills (All/Consents/Signatures/Invoices), date range pickers, Export CSV button, Refresh button, results table with type badges, View modal with Download Invoice PDF. Partner role correctly blocked from seeing Legal Archive in sidebar.
feature: Legal Archive - Admin Compliance Dashboard with searchable consents, signatures, invoices

minor.issue: Unauthenticated requests return 403 instead of 401 (acceptable - still blocks access)

backend_tests.test_01_admin_can_access_stats: PASS - Stats returned: consents=2, signatures=1, invoices=4, total=7
backend_tests.test_03_partner_cannot_access_search: PASS - Partner blocked from search endpoint
backend_tests.test_05_search_returns_all_records: PASS - Search returned 7 records with correct structure
backend_tests.test_06_search_filter_by_consent_type: PASS - Consent filter returns only consent records
backend_tests.test_07_search_filter_by_signature_type: PASS - Signature filter returns only signature records
backend_tests.test_08_search_filter_by_invoice_type: PASS - Invoice filter returns only invoice records
backend_tests.test_11_search_results_sorted_desc: PASS - Results sorted by timestamp descending
backend_tests.test_14_partner_cannot_get_by_ref_id: PASS - Partner blocked from fetching by ref_id
backend_tests.test_15_consent_record_fields: PASS - Consent records have all expected fields including preview
backend_tests.test_16_signature_record_fields: PASS - Signature records have ip_address, file_size fields
backend_tests.test_17_invoice_record_fields: PASS - Invoice records have amount field
backend_tests.test_18_stats_match_search_counts: PASS - Stats counts match search results

frontend_tests.legal_archive_navigation: PASS - Found via System group in sidebar
frontend_tests.stat_cards: PASS - Total Records (7), Consents (2), E-Signatures (1), Invoices (4)
frontend_tests.filter_pills: PASS - All 4 filter pills found (filter-all, filter-consent, filter-signature, filter-invoice)
frontend_tests.results_table: PASS - Shows 7 records with Type badges, Reference IDs, Client info, Amount, Date, Actions
frontend_tests.view_modal: PASS - data-testid=legal-detail-modal opens with client/partner/timestamp/amount + Download Invoice PDF button
frontend_tests.consent_filter: PASS - Shows only consent records with emerald badges
frontend_tests.partner_legal_archive_hidden: PASS - Legal Archive NOT visible in partner sidebar

critical_code_review_comments: legal_archive.py correctly implements admin-only access via _admin_only() helper
Search endpoint correctly aggregates from 3 collections (proposal_consent_emails, pa_signatures, pa_invoices)
Results correctly sorted by timestamp descending
LegalArchive.jsx correctly implements all UI elements with proper data-testid attributes
AdminDashboard.jsx correctly adds Legal Archive to System group in sidebar
Partner sidebar correctly excludes Legal Archive (admin-only feature)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and flows verified

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing records from previous iterations (2 consents, 1 signature, 4 invoices)

mocked_apis.ai: AI is REAL (Claude API via Emergent LLM key)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 85 verified Legal Archive P1 feature: (1) Backend endpoints - GET /api/legal-archive/stats returns {consents, signatures, invoices, total}, GET /api/legal-archive/search supports q, record_type, start_date, end_date filters, GET /api/legal-archive/{ref_id} fetches by reference_id; (2) All endpoints admin-only (403 for partner/CM/client); (3) Frontend - LegalArchive.jsx at /app/frontend/src/components/LegalArchive.jsx, accessible via System group in admin sidebar, shows 4 stat cards, search bar, filter pills, date pickers, Export CSV, Refresh, results table with View modal; (4) Partner sidebar correctly hides Legal Archive.
